queries.question: What cooking shows have an audience score of 7.5 and what reality TV shows have the same score?
queries.sql:
SELECT TelevisionShows.Name 
FROM TelevisionShows
WHERE (TelevisionShows.Genre = "Cooking Show" OR TelevisionShows.Genre = "Reality TV Show") AND TelevisionShows.Audience_Score = 7.5
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?televisionshows a :Tv_Show .
  ?televisionshows p:name ?name .
  ?televisionshows p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?televisionshows p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?televisionshows p:Audience_Score ?audience_score_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Cooking Show" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Reality TV Show")) && (STR(?audience_score_w) = "7.5")))
}

queries.question: List all cooking shows and also list reality TV shows with an audience score of 7.5.
queries.sql:
SELECT TelevisionShows.Name 
FROM TelevisionShows
WHERE TelevisionShows.Genre = "Cooking Show" OR TelevisionShows.Genre = "Reality TV Show" AND TelevisionShows.Audience_Score = 7.5
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?televisionshows a :Tv_Show .
  ?televisionshows p:name ?name .
  ?televisionshows p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?televisionshows p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?televisionshows p:Audience_Score ?audience_score_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Cooking Show" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Reality TV Show" && (STR(?audience_score_w) = "7.5"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me cooking shows and reality TV shows with an audience score of 7.5.
